# Nicket Uttarwar

> Personal site: product, DevOps, AI, career timeline, life story, visual art, and contact. Static HTML; machine-readable pages and JSON artwork index.

## Site

- [Home](https://nicketuttarwar.com/)
- [About](https://nicketuttarwar.com/about/) — background, education, heritage (Naturell), FAQ
- [Experience](https://nicketuttarwar.com/experience/) — professional roles and timeline
- [Nicket's Life](https://nicketuttarwar.com/life/) — life journey timeline
- [Art](https://nicketuttarwar.com/art/) — creative work; links to full portfolio
- [Contact](https://nicketuttarwar.com/contact/) — email

## Uttarwar Art (interactive portfolio)

- [Uttarwar Art](https://nicketuttarwar.com/uttarwarart/) — 3D scroll portfolio (requires JavaScript for full experience)
- [Art index JSON](https://nicketuttarwar.com/uttarwarart/data/art-index.json) — artwork metadata and structure for tools and automations

## Machine-readable extras

- [Sitemap](https://nicketuttarwar.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://nicketuttarwar.com/robots.txt)
- Not found: custom [404](https://nicketuttarwar.com/404.html) page (`noindex`; used for bad URLs via CDN/server config)

## Profiles

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicket-uttarwar/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/NicketUttarwar)
